mandate: Latency reduction, efficiency, and resource optimization.

checklist.check_zero_copy: Favor `std::move`, `std::string_view`, and `base::RefCountedString` to prevent unnecessary allocations and copies during IPC or data processing.
checklist.check_concurrency: Minimize mutex contention. Favor lock-free structures or fine-grained locking.
checklist.check_sequence_affinity: Ensure long-running tasks don't block the UI or IO threads. Offload work to background task runners appropriately.
